Chateau Mcely lies in the heart of the legendary St.George Forest, high on a hill, and offers superb vistas. Formerly it was the Thurn-Taxis aristocracyâ€™s manor. The individually-styled rooms and suites are in keeping with the Chateauâ€™s style.
